    Any Entity (Nation, State, Municipality, invalid input: '&c') which appears on the Map is a MapEntity.

    Municipality
    Municipalities are various types of inhabited places in the United States.
    Municipality.TypeClass
    TypeClass describes the various classes or levels of local government, which vary by state.
    Nation
    Singleton class holding values for the Nation, or the United States.
    State
    Map entity for the second-largest geographical division, including States, Commonwealths, District, and Territories.
